<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Vonage\Client; use RuntimeException; use Vonage\Client; trait ClientAwareTrait { /** * @var Client */ protected $client; public function setClient(Client $client): self { $this->client = $client; return $this; } public function getClient(): ?Client { if (isset($this->client)) { return $this->client; } throw new RuntimeException('Vonage\Client not set'); } }
